displayTitle: Adventures: Luke Skywalker and the Treasure of the Dragonsnakes
synopsis: Star Wars Adventures: Luke Skywalker and the Treasure of the Dragonsnakes is the third issue to be released in the Dark Horse Comics Star Wars Adventures graphic-novella series, taking place during The Empire Strikes Back. It was published by Dark Horse on February 3, 2010.
title: Star Wars Adventures: Luke Skywalker and the Treasure of the Dragonsnakes
